landing.title: Freshdesk: AI-powered platform for modern customer service | Freshworks
landing.text:
Freshdesk: AI-powered platform for modern customer service | Freshworks
English
Contact Sales
Login
Skip to main content
Products
AI Platform
Resources
Pricing
Demo
Try it free
FRESHDESK
Customer service that puts people first
With Freshdesk, AI handles the complexity from day one while your team builds the connections. All in a central workspace designed for faster and accurate resolutions.
Try it free
Book a demo
TRUSTED BY 74,000+ BUSINESSES WORLDWIDE
What's new
Why Freshdesk
Freddy AI
Testimonials
Capabilities
Introducing Vertical AI Agents and a new customer service home
Resolve complex, yet repetitive queries with ready-to-launch Vertical AI Agents and 50+ prebuilt agentic workflows. Bring every conversation, AI intelligence, and customer insight together in the Freshdesk Command Center.
Launch AI agents in minutes
Resolve in a central workspace
Seamless support. Smarter agents. Faster resolutions.
Unify every channel, cut the noise, and give agents an easy-to-use platform to resolve requests without missing a beat. With Freshdesk, you don’t just keep up, you stay ahead.
0:00
/ 0:00
Auto-resolve issues with AI agents
AI agents go beyond suggestions. They take action. From resolving routine queries to updating records and processing requests, these digital teammates handle the busywork. No waiting, no hand-holding. Just automated resolutions, 24/7.
Be resolution ready with a single workspace
Work smarter with AI Copilot and AI Insights
Streamline every queue, every time
Meet Freddy AI
From AI Agents that resolve queries and tasks to AI Copilot and AI Insights for human agents and leaders, Freddy combines automation and intelligence to help your team work more efficiently, scale effortlessly, and deliver great experiences across every channel.
Learn more
0:00
/ 0:00
Join 74,000+ companies uncomplicating customer service
View all customer stories
I want the ability to get one view of how we support our customers—not just the number of tickets, but any information on how we interact with them. You've got to bring everything into one platform. Freshworks allows us to do that.
Tony Barbone
Chief Revenue Officer
Read more
Freshdesk’s agent workspace, and how it worked, was very user-friendly—it had all the features we needed to collect tickets, assign tickets to different agents, and store information.
Luke Gaspar
Field Engineer
Read more
I had team members who weren’t comfortable at all with emails. With Freddy AI, they’ve gained so much confidence, and the quality of emails they’re sending now is remarkable.
Keira Hayter
Sales Team Manager
Read more
AI chatbots now answer up to 30% of questions, helping to free up Hobbycraft's agents so they can spend more time sharing their crafting knowledge.
Simon Birch
Head of Customer Experience, Hobbycraft
Read more
The full customer service experience
Everything you need to support customers and empower teams—all in one place, available out of the box.
Omnichannel customer service
Support customers on any channel with AI, context, and workflows in one connected view.
Freshdesk Command Center
Bring every conversation, AI Intelligence, and customer insight into a single, central view.
Advanced ticketing
Resolve issues that need deeper problem solving with a robust ticketing platform.
Freddy AI Agent
Resolve complex, repetitive queries with ready to launch AI agents.
Freddy AI Copilot
Help agents work smarter with AI summaries, live translations, reply suggestions, and more.
Freddy AI Insights
Give proactive visibility to leaders when issues arise and ask questions to get instant insights.
Self-service
Empower customers to find answers with AI agents and knowledge base.
Collaboration
Solve complex issues that require multiple teams easily.
Advanced workflows
Automate routing, prioritization, SLAs based on sentiment, agent skills, and workload.
Industry-leading results with Freshdesk
Up to 80%
Resolutions with Freddy AI Agent
<2 mins
Average conversational resolution time
97%
Omnichannel first contact resolution rate
60%
Improved agent productivity with Freddy AI Copilot
*Stats sourced from Customer Results and
Customer Service Benchmark Report 2025
INSTALL. CUSTOMIZE. BUILD.
Connect your business apps
Integrate with the tools your team relies on, seamlessly connected with Freshdesk. Get started without any complexity.
Explore integrations
TOP-RATED
The experts agree
Recognized by G2 and TrustRadius for delivering modern, AI-powered customer service that drives results.
Explore insights & resources on AI-powered customer service
Real-world stories, practical insights, and tools to help you deliver modern, AI-powered customer service.
Report
2025 Customer Service Report
Evaluate your performance against industry competitors to see how you measure up.
Study
Forrester on the TEI of Freshworks
See the Total Economic ImpactTM of ticketing and conversational support in one with Freshworks.
Get started with Freshdesk
Trial
Free to try. Fast to scale.
Experience the power of Freshdesk with a free trial. No credit card needed. Set up in minutes and see immediate value.
Try it free
Contact Sales
See rapid impact in action
Let our product experts show you how Freshdesk can solve your specific challenges. Get a personalized walkthrough tailored to your needs.
Book a demo
Product Tour
Learn, explore, get inspired
Check out the interactive product tour to explore Freshdesk’s capabilities.
Take the tour

Preferences
Accept all
Privacy Preference Center
Your Privacy
Your Privacy
When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
More information
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
Strictly Necessary Cookies
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms.    You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
Functional Cookies
These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages.    If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
Performance Cookies
These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.    All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
Targeting Cookies
These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.    They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Extend the power of Freshdesk
View all features
Start free. Scale as you grow.
$0 for 1-2 agents for 6 months
Perfect for small teams, the free program includes essential helpdesk features such as ticketing, a knowledge base, and pre-built reports to help you resolve issues faster and scale as you grow.
No credit card required. 24x5 support.
Try it free
Trusted by 74,000+ Businesses Worldwide
Using Freshdesk has been an unmitigated success—it’s deployed on multiple teams and departments, and there’s been no pushback.
Bryce Young
User Operations Engineer, Hired
Read more
Frequently Asked Questions
How does the 14-day free trial work?
When you sign up, you instantly get access to our Enterprise plan for 14 days. We will alert you before your trial expires. You can then select a plan and pay by credit card to continue using the product. If you choose not to continue, your account will be suspended.
Can I upgrade or downgrade my subscription?
Yes, you can choose to upgrade your subscription instantly. If you wish to downgrade or cancel your subscription, you can do so at the end of your term. Click on ‘Billing’ in your Freshdesk account to modify your subscription details.
Do you have any cancellation fees?
No. Freshdesk is a pay-as-you-go service. We do not have any cancellation fees. You can cancel whenever you want, but your cancellation will come into effect only after the end of your term.
What types of payment do you accept?
We accept Visa, Mastercard, Discover, and American Express. We do not accept PayPal. We will not be able to accept purchase orders over the phone. All of our offline payments follow USD pricing.
What is a session in Freddy AI Agent?
A session is a unique interaction between an end-user and an AI Agent.

In Freddy AI Agent Studio, an Email AI Agent session is defined as a 72-hour window starting from the customer’s first email. All AI responses within that window count as a single session, regardless of the number of replies.
Learn more
How can I buy additional Freddy AI Agent sessions?
You can purchase any number of AI agent session packs. The validity corresponds to your payment cycle. For example, if you choose to pay quarterly, your sessions will also expire quarterly.
Do I need to purchase Freddy AI Copilot for all agents?
No, Freddy AI Copilot can be purchased and assigned to any number of agents of your choice.
Do I get free Freddy AI Agent sessions on any plan?
We offer 500 sessions with Pro and Enterprise plans to try out Freddy AI agents. This is limited to once per account. Once exhausted, you need to buy additional sessions based on your requirements.
Are day passes available for Freddy AI Copilot?
No, day passes are not available for Freddy AI Copilot.
What are connector app tasks?
We offer pre-built connectors to make data sync and workflow automation with any external application simple. Here’s a
list of connector apps
that we offer. You will consume tasks when any of these connector apps are used.
Contact Freshworks
Contact Us
or

hits.title: Zendesk CEO calls Freshdesk a freaking rip off - Freshdesk responds
How Hacker News and FreshDesk led me to quit my job and launch my own startup
Ask HN: Review our startup, Freshdesk
Mikkel Svane, CEO of Zendesk called Freshdesk “A Freaking-RIP-OFF"
Show HN: A Self-Hosted Alternative to Freshdesk, Zend Desk, and Help Scout
How we scaled Freshdesk (Part I) – Before Sharding
He was employee #3 at Freshdesk. Now he is off stealth to take on SurveyMonkey

analysis.name: Freshdesk
analysis.tagline: Customer service that puts people first
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered omnichannel customer service platform where Freddy AI handles complex, repetitive queries while agents work in a unified command center for faster resolutions.
analysis.ideal_customer: Customer support teams at businesses of all sizes (74,000+ customers) wanting AI-augmented ticketing with omnichannel support

features.name: ticketing
features.description: Core ticket creation, assignment, and management system

features.name: shared inbox
features.description: Team inbox for collaborative ticket handling

features.name: threads and tasks
features.description: Organize ticket conversations into threads with associated tasks

features.name: customer portal
features.description: Self-service portal for customers to submit and track tickets

features.name: customized support portals
features.description: Fully branded/customized customer portals

features.name: multilingual help desk
features.description: Support tickets and portal in multiple languages

features.name: collaborators
features.description: 5,000 collaborators included for cross-team ticket collaboration

features.name: omnichannel support
features.description: Unified support across email, chat, phone, social, and messaging channels
features.evidence_quote: Support customers on any channel with AI, context, and workflows in one connected view

features.name: freshdesk command center
features.description: Central workspace unifying conversations, AI intelligence, and customer insights
features.evidence_quote: Bring every conversation, AI Intelligence, and customer insight into a single, central view

features.name: advanced ticketing
features.description: Robust ticketing platform for deeper problem solving

features.name: custom objects
features.description: User-defined data objects tied to tickets

features.name: custom reporting
features.description: Build and customize reports beyond prebuilt templates

features.name: freddy ai agent
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that resolve routine and complex queries 24/7
features.evidence_quote: Resolve complex, repetitive queries with ready to launch AI agents

features.name: ai agent studio
features.description: Studio to build and configure AI agents

features.name: email ai agent
features.description: AI agent handling email support autonomously

features.name: vertical ai agents
features.description: Ready-to-launch AI agents tailored to specific verticals
features.evidence_quote: ready-to-launch Vertical AI Agents and 50+ prebuilt agentic workflows

features.name: prebuilt agentic workflows
features.description: 50+ prebuilt agentic workflows to accelerate deployment

features.name: freddy ai copilot
features.description: In-agent AI assistant with summaries, translations, and reply suggestions
features.evidence_quote: AI summaries, live translations, reply suggestions

features.name: ai summaries
features.description: AI-generated conversation and ticket summaries

features.name: live translations
features.description: Real-time message translation for agents

features.name: reply suggestions
features.description: AI-suggested reply drafts for agents

features.name: freddy ai insights
features.description: Proactive AI-driven analytics and natural-language insight queries for leaders
features.evidence_quote: proactive visibility to leaders when issues arise and ask questions to get instant insights

features.name: analytics
features.description: Reporting and analytics on support performance

features.name: prebuilt reports
features.description: Out-of-the-box reports for common support metrics

features.name: self service
features.description: Self-service tools for customers to resolve issues on their own

features.name: knowledge base
features.description: Solution articles repository for self-service and agent reference

features.name: routing
features.description: Automated ticket routing based on rules

features.name: sla management
features.description: Service level agreement definitions and tracking

features.name: different routing mechanisms
features.description: Multiple routing strategies (round-robin, load-based, etc.)

features.name: skills-based assignment
features.description: Route tickets to agents based on skill match

features.name: sentiment-based routing
features.description: Route/prioritize based on message sentiment
features.evidence_quote: Automate routing, prioritization, SLAs based on sentiment

features.name: workload-based routing
features.description: Distribute tickets based on agent workload
features.evidence_quote: based on sentiment, agent skills, and workload

features.name: advanced workflows
features.description: Complex workflow automation for support processes

features.name: approval workflows
features.description: Workflows requiring manager approvals

features.name: audit logs
features.description: Log of admin/user changes for compliance

features.name: administration
features.description: Admin controls for accounts, roles, and configuration

features.name: security features
features.description: Additional enterprise security controls

features.name: collaboration
features.description: Cross-team collaboration on complex issues
features.evidence_quote: Solve complex issues that require multiple teams easily

features.name: csat surveys
features.description: Customer satisfaction surveys post-resolution
features.evidence_quote: workflows such as SLAs, CSAT surveys, ticket forms

features.name: ticket forms
features.description: Configurable forms for ticket submission
features.evidence_quote: workflows such as SLAs, CSAT surveys, ticket forms

features.name: multichannel
features.description: Support across multiple channels (email, chat, phone, social)

features.name: email support
features.description: Email-based ticket ingestion and reply
features.evidence_quote: Integrate your Support channels with Freshdesk

features.name: ai chatbots
features.description: AI chatbots that answer customer questions
features.evidence_quote: AI chatbots now answer up to 30% of questions

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: iOS/Android mobile apps for agents

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Marketplace with prebuilt integrations and apps

features.name: connector apps
features.description: Prebuilt connectors for external data sync and workflow automation
features.evidence_quote: pre-built connectors to make data sync and workflow automation

features.name: kanban board
features.description: Visual kanban view of tickets

features.name: ticket scheduling
features.description: Schedule recurring tickets at regular intervals
features.evidence_quote: Effortlessly schedule your tickets at regular intervals

features.name: checklists
features.description: Ticket checklists and subtickets via marketplace

features.name: conditional field hiding
features.description: Hide ticket fields based on conditional rules
features.evidence_quote: Hide any field in a Freshdesk ticket based on the condition(s)

features.name: custom from email
features.description: Automatically set From email based on ticket properties
features.evidence_quote: Automatically set 'From' email based on ticket properties

features.name: developer api
features.description: Public API for building custom integrations

features.name: system status page
features.description: Public operational status page with alert subscriptions
features.evidence_quote: Check the operational statistics of Freshdesk and subscribe to alerts

features.name: release notes
features.description: Public release notes with subscription alerts
features.evidence_quote: Stay updated on new features and product changes

features.name: community
features.description: User community forum for peer support

features.name: training academy
features.description: Agent training and certification via Freshworks Academy
features.evidence_quote: Need to train your new agents on Freshdesk? Enroll them in the Academy

features.name: ai actions in apps
features.description: Marketplace apps with AI Actions capabilities

differentiators: AI agents that take action, not just make suggestions ('go beyond suggestions. They take action')
Vertical AI Agents with 50+ prebuilt agentic workflows ready-to-launch
Freshdesk Command Center as single central workspace unifying conversations + AI + insights
Up to 80% resolutions with Freddy AI Agent
60% improved agent productivity with Freddy AI Copilot

recent_ships.what: Vertical AI Agents and Freshdesk Command Center launched
recent_ships.source: Introducing Vertical AI Agents and a new customer service home
Resolve complex, yet repetitive queries with ready-to-launch Vertical AI Agents and 50+ prebuilt agentic workflows
Freddy AI Agent has arrived — Conversational. Autonomous. Always on.

praised: 'Freshdesk's agent workspace...was very user-friendly—it had all the features we needed'
'Using Freshdesk has been an unmitigated success—it's deployed on multiple teams and departments, and there's been no pushback'
'AI chatbots now answer up to 30% of questions, helping to free up Hobbycraft's agents'
'With Freddy AI, they've gained so much confidence, and the quality of emails they're sending now is remarkable'
complaints: Historical HN threads highlight Zendesk CEO calling Freshdesk 'a freaking rip-off' — positioning as a Zendesk copycat
Reports of past DDoS attack ('Freshdesk is under DDos attack')
Self-hosted alternatives sought ('Show HN: A Self-Hosted Alternative to Freshdesk, Zendesk, and Help Scout')

free_tier.limits: $0 for 1-2 agents for 6 months; ticketing, knowledge base, pre-built reports

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.headline_inclusions: Ticketing, customer portal, reports for small businesses

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Growth + custom portals, custom objects, advanced ticketing, custom reporting, routing

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pro + audit logs, approval workflows, skills-based assignments, security features

pricing.notes: 14-day free trial on Enterprise plan; free tier for 1-2 agents for 6 months. Freddy AI Agent: first 500 sessions included on Pro/Enterprise, then $49 per 100 sessions (72-hour email session window). Freddy AI Copilot sold separately per agent, no day passes. Connector app tasks consumed on external integrations. Prices shown are annual billing.
